month: # ===== FULL-PERIOD TOTAL (single continuous 2025-01-01 to 2026-07-13 query - NOT a sum of the 19 rows above) =====
# Note: Vendor Sales/Units for the FULL PERIOD must be computed as one continuous range
# because at least one vendor_sales period spans a calendar-month boundary and would otherwise be double-counted
# once per month it touches. This is the same documented period-overlap/no-proration behaviour already recorded
# in the dashboard's Data Coverage Notes - not a new bug. The per-month rows above are individually exact; only
# their Vendor Sales/Units columns should not be summed across months to reproduce the full-period Vendor total.
